0.text: Numerous non-specific, subcentimeter nodules in both lung parenchyma

1.text: Atelectasis with associated structural distortion and volume loss in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

2.text: Saccular bronchiectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

3.text: Nodular lesion approximately 10x14 mm with a tree-in-bud pattern in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
